channel.title: The Security Gazette
channel.description: Recent content on The Security Gazette

item.title: CCTV for Airports and Transport Hubs — National Security Standards UK 2026
item.description: Comprehensive guide to CCTV at UK airports and transport hubs: DfT compliance, terminal coverage, baggage hall security, car park surveillance, and counter-terrorism requirements.

item.title: CCTV for Apartment Blocks and Flats — Legal Requirements and Best Practice Guide 2026
item.description: Essential guidance on CCTV installation in apartment blocks and flats: planning permission, communal area coverage, data protection obligations, and resident privacy rights under UK law.

item.title: CCTV for Banks and Building Societies — Financial Security Standards UK 2026
item.description: Comprehensive guide to CCTV standards for UK banks and building societies: counter surveillance, ATM monitoring, vault protection, and FCA compliance requirements.

item.title: CCTV for Cinemas and Theatres — Entertainment Venue Security UK 2026
item.description: CCTV installation for cinemas and theatres: screen protection against piracy, box office security, auditorium monitoring, audience safeguarding, and licensing compliance.

item.title: CCTV for Holiday Parks and Campsites — Seasonal Security UK 2026
item.description: How to implement effective CCTV for holiday parks, caravan sites, and campsites: entrance control, seasonal considerations, static caravan security, and guest privacy protection.

item.title: CCTV for Hospitals and NHS Facilities — Compliance and Security Guide 2026
item.description: How NHS trusts and private hospitals can deploy CCTV lawfully: patient privacy protections, A&E security, car park surveillance, and compliance with UK GDPR and the Data (Use and Access) Act 2025.

item.title: CCTV for Industrial Estates and Business Parks — Shared Security UK 2026
item.description: CCTV strategies for industrial estates and business parks: shared perimeter security, unit-level access control, landlord responsibilities, and tenant data protection considerations.

item.title: CCTV for Libraries and Community Centres — Public Building Security UK 2026
item.description: How to implement proportionate CCTV in libraries and community centres: balancing public access, safeguarding vulnerable users, and meeting local authority data protection obligations.

item.title: CCTV for Listed Buildings and Heritage Sites — Conservation-Compliant Security UK 2026
item.description: How to install CCTV in listed buildings and heritage sites without damaging historic fabric: conservation-compliant mounting, discreet camera options, and listed building consent procedures.

item.title: CCTV for Marinas and Boat Storage — Marine Security UK 2026
item.description: Complete guide to securing marinas and boat storage facilities with CCTV: coastal weatherproof cameras, pontoon coverage, vessel protection, and 24/7 remote monitoring solutions.

item.title: CCTV for Museums and Galleries — Protecting Exhibits and Visitors UK 2026
item.description: Expert guidance on CCTV for museums, galleries, and exhibition spaces: discreet surveillance options, heritage building compliance, and the balance between security and visitor experience.

item.title: CCTV for Petrol Stations and Garages — Forecourt Security UK 2026
item.description: Complete CCTV compliance guide for UK petrol stations and garages: forecourt coverage, number plate recognition, drive-off prevention, and payment area security.

item.title: CCTV for Sports Stadiums and Arenas — Crowd Safety and Security UK 2026
item.description: Large-scale CCTV deployment for UK sports stadiums and arenas: SGSA compliance, crowd monitoring, entry control, concourse coverage, and safety certificate requirements.

item.title: CCTV for Student Accommodation — Safety and Privacy Guide UK 2026
item.description: Essential guidance for PBSA providers and university halls: CCTV in communal areas, ANUK/Unipol compliance, resident privacy rights, and best practice for student safety.

item.title: CCTV for Universities and Higher Education — Campus Security Guide UK 2026
item.description: How UK universities can implement effective campus-wide CCTV: student safety, accommodation monitoring, lecture hall security, and compliance with education sector data protection rules.

item.title: CCTV in Parks and Public Spaces — Community Safety Guide UK 2026
item.description: Guidance on deploying CCTV in UK parks and public spaces: reducing anti-social behaviour, the 12 guiding principles of the Surveillance Camera Code, and council compliance obligations.
